title: Tyler Technologies to Participate in March 2022 Investor Conferences
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TYL--Tyler Technologies will participate in two investor conferences in March 2022.

title: Tyler Technologies Renews Contract for Digital Government and Payment Solutions in the State of Arkansas
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #Arkansas--Tyler Technologies announced that the state of Arkansas has renewed its contract for Tyler's digital government and payment services.

title: Tyler Technologies Unveils New Brand Architecture
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TYL--Tyler Technologies announced its new brand architecture, a broad company initiative that better organizes and names Tyler's products and solutions.

title: Tyler Technologies, Inc. (TYL) CEO Lynn Moore on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Tyler Technologies, Inc. (TYL) CEO Lynn Moore on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: Tyler's (TYL) Q4 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Up Y/Y
text: Tyler's (TYL) Q4 earnings reflect benefits from post-acquisition contributions of NIC and constant rebound of market and sales activities at pre-COVID levels.

title: Tyler Technologies (TYL) Surpasses Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Tyler Technologies (TYL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0.57% and 0.46%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Tyler Technologies Reports Earnings for Fourth Quarter 2021
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TYL--Tyler Technologies reports its earnings for fourth quarter 2021.

title: Tyler (TYL) to Report Q4 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: Tyler's (TYL) Q4 performance is expected to have witnessed the benefits from recent acquisitions and higher deal wins. However, higher employee healthcare expenses might have clipped operating margins.

title: Will Tyler Technologies (TYL) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
text: Tyler Technologies (TYL) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Tyler (TYL) Buys Outdoor Recreation Solution Firm US eDirect
text: The acquisition of US eDirect is likely to enhance Tyler Technologies' (TYL) outdoor solution portfolio and is believed to allow it to offer an extensive all-in-one outdoor recreation management solution.

title: Tyler Technologies Acquires US eDirect
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #NIC--Tyler Technologies announced today it has acquired US eDirect, a leading provider of technology solutions for outdoor recreation management.

title: Tyler Technologies Extends Contract for Digital Government and Payment Solutions in Hawaii
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TYL--Tyler Technologies announced the state of Hawaii signed a contract extension for Tyler's digital government and payments services for three years.
